run2_56_content_gap_diagnosis.summary: Run 2.56 solves measurable role-renderer sameness but still under-explains Vulca as a product.
primary_failure_modes: product capability graph not visible enough
code-generated editable PPT claim not explicit enough
reader questions not enforced before renderer execution
repair loop and release boundary not clear enough
run2_56_content_gap_diagnosis.why_not_more_visual_tweaks: Further changes to colors, blocks, curves, and renderer role variation have diminishing returns until product content contracts become stricter.

generation_boundary.reason: Run 2.57 repairs content database and workflow contracts only. Run 2.58 is the next generated four-arm PPT proof.
generation_boundary.viewer_policy: The HTML viewer should expose Run 2.57 in the Data/Skill tab while keeping latestRunId at 2.56.

control_boundary.bad_run2_56_without_product_capability_c: may see Run 2.56 generated result and trace, but must not bind Run 2.57 product capability memory, slide message contracts, or content workflow gates

repair_contract.product capability: explain what Vulca takes in, what it understands, what it generates, what it compares, how it verifies, what it outputs, and how it repairs
repair_contract.slide message contracts: force each slide to answer a concrete reader question with required product terms and visible product objects
repair_contract.content workflow gates: fail generic claims and wrong output claims before native PPT drawing
